CommunityApplications.Profile: Unraid Rsync — a native Unraid 7.x webGui plugin that schedules and monitors multiple rsync backup jobs, either over SSH to/from a remote host or locally between two paths on the server. Per-job cron schedules (or manual-only run-on-demand), a whitelisted rsync option set with inline help, source→destination pairs, pre/post hooks, live status badges, a per-run log viewer with full-log download, paginated history across all jobs, native notifications, an Overview tab, and an Unraid Dashboard widget. Reusable SSH connections with existing-key-file / managed-key / password auth. Support: open an issue on the GitHub repository.
